description: Namecheap is a domain registrar and web services provider offering domain registration, DNS, SSL, hosting, email, and related account management services. Its public developer interface is an XML API for automating domain and account operations.
summary: Namecheap exposes a documented XML-over-HTTP API in production and sandbox, authenticated with account username, API key, and whitelisted client IP passed as request parameters; no first-party GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI surfaced on namecheap.com.
